title: AgentTask
description: Schema for a single agent or orchestrator task

type.description: Orchestrator delegates to subtasks; task performs actual work

agent.description: Agent or sub-agent responsible for this task

dependsOn.description: Array of task IDs that must be completed before this task can start

requiresApproval.description: If true, task moves to awaiting_approval before it can be marked completed

user.description: The original user prompt or instruction

core.description: Shared system prompt applied to all agents

context.description: Task-specific prompt describing expected tool usage and output format

contextFile.description: Path to an .md file with additional context for this task

projectId.description: Optional ID linking this task to a project (references projects.id)

parentTaskId.description: ID of the parent orchestrator task, null for root-level tasks

previousTaskId.description: ID of the previous sibling task at the same level, null for the first task

nextTaskId.description: ID of the next sibling task at the same level, null for the last task

reminders.description: Zero or more reminders linked to this task (mirrors reminders table)

remindAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the reminder fires (reminders.remind_at)

sent.description: Whether this reminder has been sent (reminders.sent)

subtasks.description: Array of task IDs managed by this orchestrator (only used when type is orchestrator)

result.description: Output produced by the task upon completion

response.description: Final response to send back to the user

inputType.description: Origin type of the input (e.g. telegram, webhook, scheduled)

telegram.description: Telegram-specific message info, null when input is not from Telegram
